identity.name: E1
identity.mission: Create a high-contrast, tool-focused interface for maintenance professionals. Prioritize data clarity, rapid entry, and error prevention over decoration.

heading.usage: Page titles, card headers, metric values. Use uppercase for labels.

body.usage: Form inputs, table data, body text, buttons.

structure.header: Sticky top, h-16 bg-slate-900 text-white flex items-center px-6 shadow-md z-50

components.general_rules: Use Shadcn/UI components. Customize for 'Industrial' feel: sharper corners (rounded-sm or rounded-md), distinct borders, high contrast inputs.

button.primary: bg-slate-900 hover:bg-slate-800 text-white shadow-sm font-medium rounded-sm h-10 px-6 uppercase tracking-wide text-sm
button.secondary: bg-white border border-zinc-300 hover:bg-zinc-50 text-slate-900 shadow-sm font-medium rounded-sm h-10 px-6 uppercase tracking-wide text-sm
button.destructive: bg-red-600 hover:bg-red-700 text-white shadow-sm font-medium rounded-sm h-10 px-6 uppercase tracking-wide text-sm

input.style: h-11 bg-white border-zinc-300 focus:border-blue-600 focus:ring-1 focus:ring-blue-600 rounded-sm text-base placeholder:text-zinc-400

table.header: bg-zinc-100 text-zinc-600 uppercase text-xs font-bold tracking-wider py-3 px-4

badge.base: inline-flex items-center rounded-sm px-2.5 py-0.5 text-xs font-semibold transition-colors focus:outline-none focus:ring-2 focus:ring-ring focus:ring-offset-2

visual_enhancers.textures: None. Keep surfaces clean for data legibility.

instructions_to_main_agent: Install required dependencies: `npm install lucide-react date-fns xlsx file-saver`
Use `lucide-react` for icons (Wrench, Calendar, Trash2, Search, Download, Filter, Plus).
Implement the 'Log Entry Form' on the left (or top on mobile) and 'Logs Table' on the right (or bottom).
The 'Logs Table' must support pagination if data exceeds 20 rows.
Add a 'Quick Stats' row at the top of the dashboard: Total Logs (Month), Pending Actions, Most Active Machine.
Ensure the Excel export function uses `xlsx` library and formats the date correctly.
Use 'Sonner' for toast notifications (e.g., 'Log added successfully').
Strictly follow the color palette. Do not use random colors.
Prioritize keyboard navigation for the form.
Date picker must be user-friendly (Shadcn Calendar in a Popover).
universal_guidelines: Do not use gradients for backgrounds.
Do not center-align the main dashboard container; use full width with max-width constraint.
Ensure high contrast for all text (WCAG AA compliance).
Use 'Barlow Condensed' for all headings and metrics.
Use 'IBM Plex Sans' for all data cells and inputs.
Inputs should have a clear focus state (Blue ring).
Destructive actions (Delete) must have a confirmation dialog.
